notice: Maintenance & failover truth: every notice declares whether it is a maintenance, drain, failover, or tenant-migration window, the exact window time / timezone / offset, the affected deployment scope and write classes, which queued publish-later or local-draft work survives (kept separate from successful hosted mutations), what stays local-safe, and any changed tenant / region / endpoint boundary. A notice reads as current only while it is active and its last refresh is current — otherwise it downgrades and names why, and never collapses into a generic degraded banner. Shell, activity history, CLI / headless inspect, diagnostics, and support exports read this record verbatim.
title: Review collaboration maintenance window
summary: Managed review collaboration pauses for a scheduled maintenance window; reads and local work continue.

affected_scope.scope_summary: Managed-cloud and enterprise review collaboration in the EU-central region.

axes.summary: Residency not affected by this window.

boundary_change.summary: No tenant, region, or endpoint boundary change.

blocked_writes.note: Review comments queue for publish-later and replay when the window ends.
Settings sync is retryable as soon as the window ends.

succeeded_hosted_mutations.note: Approval landed before the window opened.

retained_local_safe_capabilities: Editing, saving, and local search continue.
Local Git commit and branch continue.
local_continuity.continuity_summary: All local-first work continues; only managed review collaboration pauses.

display_copy.primary_status_line: Scheduled maintenance window: review collaboration pauses; reads and local work continue.
display_copy.scope_line: Managed-cloud and enterprise review collaboration in the EU-central region.
display_copy.queued_preserved_line: 1 intents preserved (1 publish-later queued, 0 local drafts); they survive the window.
display_copy.succeeded_line: 1 hosted mutations already landed and are listed separately from queued work.
display_copy.local_continuity_line: All local-first work continues; only managed review collaboration pauses.
display_copy.boundary_change_line: No tenant / region / endpoint boundary change.
display_copy.follow_up_line: Queued work will replay when the window resumes; the window time is shown in UTC with the source timezone and offset.
